title: cajanus pseudocajan
intro: Cajanus pseudocajan, also known as the yellow gram, is a leguminous plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family, native to tropical Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cajanus pseudocajan include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and provide relief from respiratory problems. The plant's medicinal properties can be harnessed through various herbal preparations, such as decoctions, infusions, and powder extracts, which are commonly used in traditional medicine.
